executives.name: Richard Williams
executives.background: Mr. Williams has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in project development and operations. He previously held senior roles at Barrick Gold Corporation.

executives.name: Rob Carpenter
executives.background: Dr. Carpenter is a professional geologist with over 30 years of experience. He was the co-founder and President/CEO of Kaminak Gold Corp., which was acquired by Goldcorp for $520 million.
